## oak service show

Show current services

### Synopsis

Show microservices registered in Oakestra.

  --app-id   <id>    filter by applicationID
  --app-name <name>  filter by application name

```
oak service show [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -i, --app-id string     Filter by application ID
  -n, --app-name string   Filter by application name
  -h, --help              help for show
```
